description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface features a prominent, single deep score running across the top, which has opened up during baking to reveal a lighter, airy interior beneath the crust. The crust appears matte and slightly rough, with subtle variations in color from light tan to deeper brown, indicating a well-baked exterior. The loaf is unsliced and has a compact, dense form typical of artisanal or country-style bread. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, hand-shaped loaf suitable for urban bakery displays or street food scenes.
description: A round, rustic loaf of bread with a golden-brown, matte crust and a single deep score across the top. The surface is unsliced, slightly rough, and shows natural color variations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, domed side of the loaf with the deep score visible along the top edge.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlights the single deep score running lengthwise and the lighter, slightly cracked crust along the opening.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the loaf with less visible scoring and a more uniform crust color.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view reveals the base of the loaf, showing a less textured, paler crust and the end of the score.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a single, deep score running lengthwise across the top, with a rough, rustic texture and no visible flour dusting or seeds. The surface is uneven and naturally cracked, giving it an artisanal appearance.
